text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 09. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that checking on some house maintenance items. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
